Stop.description: Details about a stop in the booking. It can be the pickup, dropoff or an intermediate stop

dateTime.description: Local date and time of the pickup on RFC 3339 format

dateTimeUtc.description: UTC date and time of the pickup on RFC 3339 format

iataCode.description: IATA code of the airport or train station for pickup

locationName.description: Name of the location, such as a hotel or restaurant

Stop.title: Ground Stop

cancellationPolicy.description: Details about the cancellation policy for the ground transport booking
cancellationPolicy.title: Ground Cancellation Policy

dropoff.description: Information about the dropoff location and time

extRef.description: External unique ID for the booking
extRef.title: Ground External Reference

pickup.description: Information about the pickup location and time

price.description: Price details of the vendor reservation

currency.description: Currency in which the total amount is specified

estimatedDuration.description: Estimated duration for the ground transport service in ISO 8601 duration format

hourlyRate.description: Hourly rate for the ground transport service

minimumDuration.description: Minimum duration the ground transport service must be booked for in ISO 8601 duration format

price.title: Ground Price

stops.description: Optional intermediate stops during the ground transportation
stops.title: Ground Stops

supplier.description: Aggregator or intermediary facilitating the booking
supplier.title: Ground Supplier

supplierConfirmation.description: Confirmation code provided by the supplier for the ground transport
supplierConfirmation.title: Ground Confirmation

termsAndConditions.description: Terms and conditions for the ground transport booking

url.description: URL to redirect user to the booking on supplier page

vehicle.description: Details about the assigned vehicle for the ground transportation

imageUrl.description: URL of an image representing the vehicle type

luggageCapacity.description: Number of luggage pieces the vehicle can accommodate

model.description: Model of vehicle assigned for the ground transportation

seatingCapacity.description: Number of seats in the vehicle

vehicle.title: Ground Vehicle

vendor.description: Details about the actual vendor fulfilling the ground transportation service

name.description: Name of the vendor fulfilling the reservation

vendor.title: Ground Vendor

vendorConfirmation.description: Confirmation code provided by the vendor for the ground transport booking
vendorConfirmation.title: Ground Confirmation
